articles.title: No let-up from Cyclone Narelle as dangerous storm heads south

children.content: Severe Tropical Cyclone Narelle continues to cut a destructive swathe through Western Australia's Gascoyne even as it weakens, with authorities warning the extreme weather is not over yet.

articles.title: 'No food, clothes, money': Kakadu flood victims ineligible for immediate relief

children.content: Kakadu residents whose homes have been submerged by roof-high floodwater said they feel like they've been forgotten, with evacuation centres and relief payments not made available to them.

items.title: The hidden uranium canisters that could end the Iran war

children.content: A move from Israel or the United States to find and secure Iran's enriched uranium stockpile would be dangerous, but experts say it is one of the only ways to end the war and prevent it from returning.

items.title: Craig's experience of abuse is not uncommon — but it is seldom talked about
